nodes.label: Expo SDK v56 versioned-docs warning
nodes.rationale: Expo changed enough between versions that code should not be written from memory; instructs reading the exact v56 versioned docs first.

nodes.label: Saathi app (README overview)
nodes.rationale: Money transfer intentionally not built yet — regulated and complex — so the app is designed to let that feature slot in later.

nodes.label: Saathi Assistant feature
nodes.rationale: Uses a local planner by default so the tab works without any backend AI key; can use OpenAI from the server only when OPENAI_API_KEY is configured.

nodes.label: Security note (.env / service_role key)
nodes.rationale: service_role key must never ship in the client; only the anon key is bundled into the app, protected by row level security.

nodes.label: Saathi Hero Image: Daughter Guiding Elderly Father Through Phone (rationale: hero/marketing asset depicting an adult daughter in a teal kurta warmly showing a smartphone screen to her elderly father, seated together in a softly lit, homely living room with vintage furniture, family photos, and a table lamp; a pill organizer, medicine bottle, notebook, and coffee cup sit on the table between them, signaling medication management and daily care routines; composition uses warm earth tones, shallow depth of field, and intimate framing to convey trust, dignity, and tech-assisted caregiving for elderly parents — likely used as an onboarding/landing hero for the Saathi app to visually establish its value proposition of bridging family care with technology)
nodes.norm_label: saathi hero image: daughter guiding elderly father through phone (rationale: hero/marketing asset depicting an adult daughter in a teal kurta warmly showing a smartphone screen to her elderly father, seated together in a softly lit, homely living room with vintage furniture, family photos, and a table lamp; a pill organizer, medicine bottle, notebook, and coffee cup sit on the table between them, signaling medication management and daily care routines; composition uses warm earth tones, shallow depth of field, and intimate framing to convey trust, dignity, and tech-assisted caregiving for elderly parents — likely used as an onboarding/landing hero for the saathi app to visually establish its value proposition of bridging family care with technology)

links.source_location: route-time/directions estimation (buildRouteTimePlan) parallels map_url/directions affordances on service records
AssistantAction kind enum ('call'|'directions'|'source'|'family_update'|'details') matches plan.js action schema exactly
both implement emergency/urgent escalation for elderly users (SOS callback vs URGENT_WORDS detection)
signIn(username, password) matches signin.js username/password validation
signUp(username, password, fullName) matches signup.js body.username/password/fullName
toggleLike(id, token, liked) matches like.js body.postId/body.liked
createPost({title, body, category}) matches post.js body.title/body.body/body.category
enabledPlugins.expo tooling paired with the Expo app manifest
plugins: ["expo-router"] enables the Stack/file-based routing implemented in _layout.tsx
